title: Checkboxes disappearing in Y axis chart selection
excerpt: I’m encountering an issue today while putting together a chart widget - when I select more than one checkbox for ‘Y axis’, the chart displays but then a moment later the checkboxes uncheck themselves. The chart stays dis…

posts.author: bmck097 (Brittany)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m encountering an issue today while putting together a chart widget - when I select more than one checkbox for ‘Y axis’, the chart displays but then a moment later the checkboxes uncheck themselves. The chart stays displayed as I would like it, but then when I close out, the data disappears.

This is a dashboard with multiple boards connected, however the widget itself is only pulling data from one board - this feature has worked for me in the past so I’m thinking maybe it’s a bug?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Brittany,

This sounds strange and I can’t seem to find any reported issues of this internally… Can you please let me know if this behaviour persists in an incognito window, incase this is a caching issue? Thanks for your help!

posts.author: bmck097 (Brittany)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca, thanks for the response. The issue actually fixed itself the next day - it may have been a temporary glitch. I had contacted Monday.com support so they were aware.

FWIW at the time of the issue, clearing my cache didn’t work - but at least it’s working fine now!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the update Brittany! I am glad to hear that this has fixed itself, however do apologise for the inconvenience at the time

Keep me updated on how you go with it!
